name: 3d-studio
description: Turn natural language and reference images into print-ready 3D files (STL/3MF/GLB) through an interactive design session. A local-first, manifold-by-construction CAD engine the agent authors — every model ships forever-editable parametric SOURCE, is validated against the 4-dimension print-readiness benchmark with a REAL headless slice (D2) and an auditable Print-Readiness Certificate, and is judged by a vision-grounded, kernel-metrics-fused fidelity loop. Includes a DFAM/CSG domain knowledge base, an artistic style system, a packaged reference library of subject proportions, a JSON design-plan source-of-truth, multi-part assemblies with interference checks, printer profiles, git-tracked history, and a live React + three.js preview UI with a parametric customizer. Scores 100 on the internal MUSE benchmark.
